buckets.description: Uses the wrong start event or wrong business/calendar day unit for a deadline.
Confuses RIO inquiry-extension authority with Provost investigation-extension authority.
Treats sanction modification as overturning or changing the misconduct finding.
Promotes witness statements, respondent denials, or advisory opinions into objective facts.
Turns Petrova aware-but-no-finding into either misconduct or exoneration.
Answers the Tanaka reporting-obligation question as resolved despite explicit deferral.
Uses corrected-away committee membership or publication year as current fact.
Misses the 3-year coauthorship window and replacement deadline consequences.
Drops or mistranslates Russian, German, or Japanese witness statements.
Confuses journal, university, FSRB, NSF/OIG, RIO, or Provost authority.
